titleStmt.title: SII 8.6: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 6. (A.R. No. 420 of 1902). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭant Aiyum porccayappāvaiyuñ cirttaṉic celviyu n=ta ṉ perun=te viyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiya lūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭu n tuṭarvaṉaveliyum paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷicūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟkarumaraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraicartam muṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil
muṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyum In=ti ra ṉāramu n=te ṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭai kkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅ kāvaṟ pal paḻan=ti vu māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesarivarmmarā na śrīrāje
ndra coḻade varkku yāṇṭu 6 Āṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakaṉ Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu nirveḷurnāṭṭut toṟuvaṉkāraṇaip pontaippākkiḻāṉ makaṉ ṉ kaccippeṭṭu tirukkāraikkāṭuṭaiya mahāde varkkut tirunon=tā viḷa kkoṉṟiṉukku vaitta Āṭu toṇṇūṟu . Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuñ candrādityavat cāvā muvāp perāṭāka
k kaiyyuṟṟu Ittevarkarmikaḷvacam niṉṟāṉāley nicatam Uḻakku ney yaḷantu koṭuttut taravukoḷveṉāṉeṉ maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattuk kumarakkoṭṭappuṟattup piccipākkattu maṉṟāṭi Amarāvaṉ vaṉṟoṇṭaṉeṉ . nicata meykkaṇṭu coṟu kuṭuppeṉākavum . Ivaṉ colla Eḻutiṉeṉ Innakara kkaraṇattān 4 10000 8 1000 van karumāṇikkamāna Icapamaṅkalādi ttanen ..
Digital edition of SII 8.6 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
